sc_sutta: 91 “There are, mendicants, these two things. What two? Views favoring existence and views favoring nonexistence. These are the two things.”
sutta: 2.10.1 the buddha said monks there are these two fools what two he who showed us a burden that does not befall him and he who shirks a burden that befalls him these are the two and then
